meta.title: Eye Analytics Backend – Full API Contract

status_codes.200: OK – Successful GET / PATCH / PUT / DELETE
status_codes.201: Created – Successful POST that creates a resource
status_codes.202: Accepted – Async job queued (exports, AI analysis)
status_codes.204: No Content – Successful action with no body (tracker events)
status_codes.400: Bad Request – Missing or invalid token
status_codes.403: Forbidden – Account suspended, invalid signature, insufficient plan
status_codes.404: Not Found – Resource not found or not accessible
status_codes.422: Unprocessable Entity – Validation error, wrong credentials, quota hit
status_codes.429: Too Many Requests – Rate limit exceeded
status_codes.503: Service Unavailable – Phase-2 stub or health check failure
